name: Antel
text: Large-scale refactoring reduced deployment time by 40%. GitLab CI/CD pipeline with 85% test coverage in Jest.
highlights: Developed Node.js microservices handling up to 3.5M daily transactions, integrating SQLite databases and SFTP services.
Optimized internal processes across multiple applications, making responses 50% faster and reducing errors by 99.9%.
largeText: Antel, the National Telecommunications Administration, is a Uruguayan state-owned company responsible for providing telecommunications services in Uruguay. It is the country's main provider of fixed and mobile telephony, internet, and cable television. Founded in 1974, Antel plays a key role in Uruguay's communications infrastructure, offering services both nationally and internationally.
I work in a team with a strong code review and peer mentorship culture, which deepened my expertise in microservices architecture.
workMethod: Full-Stack Developer on the internal systems team.

projects.title: CLIENT PORTAL
projects.text: Next.js + SQLite with login, validations, and SMS notifications.

projects.title: SECURITY CODES SERVICE
projects.text: Node API with authentication and security code generation.

projects.title: JAVA TO NODE MIGRATION
projects.text: Migrated an IP management system from Java to Node, maintaining functional parity.

name: Upshow
text: Built React dashboards consuming Node/Express APIs. Integrated GitHub & Jira for real-time cross-referenced reports. Agile/Scrum full lifecycle support.
highlights: Built React dashboards on Node/Express APIs used for sprint planning and release tracking.
Integrated GitHub and Jira data for real-time cross-referenced reports.
largeText: Upshow is a company specialized in technology and interactive platforms designed to enhance engagement and interaction at live events and public venues. It provides solutions that allow establishments and organizers to display user-generated content on screens and monitors, creating a more engaging experience for the audience and encouraging real-time participation.
Continuous feedback and training there sharpened my ability to integrate multiple APIs into unified, real-time reporting tools.
workMethod: Full-Stack Developer on a Scrum team building venue engagement platforms.

projects.title: React feature
projects.text: Creation of small features for React projects.

projects.title: Node, GitHub and Jira
projects.text: Data integration project between GitHub and Jira.

projects.title: Elasticsearch
projects.text: Automation project for data analysis in Elasticsearch.

projects.title: Show services status
projects.text: Project that displays the status of our services day by day and hour by hour.

name: Hacknoid
text: Migrated frontend from Zend PHP to React.js, improving load time by 60%. Git branching strategies for releases. Optimized SQL queries, reducing response by 40%.
highlights: Migrated the frontend from Zend PHP to React.js, improving load time by 60%.
Optimized SQL queries, reducing response time by 40%.
largeText: Hacknoid is a cybersecurity-oriented company that has an automated pentesting application.
workMethod: Full-Stack Developer focused on frontend migration and pentesting tooling.

projects.title: Django, Python
projects.text: Creation of backend with Django Python.

projects.text: Migration of frontend from Zend Framework to React.

projects.title: Automated pentesting

name: Gestion total
text: Developed custom JavaScript modules for ERP system, tailoring workflows to client needs across diverse industries. Responsive UI with HTML5/CSS3.
highlights: Developed custom JavaScript modules for ERPNext, tailoring workflows to client needs across diverse industries.
largeText: Gestion total sells features on an ERPNext which is focused on the administrative management of companies.
Solving day-to-day client requirements there built a strong foundation in adapting ERP systems to real business workflows.
workMethod: Full-Stack Developer building ERP customizations for clients.
